summary: The email from Anna summarizes the operations of the previous week. The marketing team successfully launched the Q2 social media campaign, which has resulted in a 12% increase in engagement. There were scheduling conflicts that led to the delay of two client onboarding calls, which need to be rescheduled for the current week. A recurring bug was identified in the invoice generation tool, and IT is expected to fix it by Thursday. The new interns will start next Monday, and preparations such as access badges, laptops, and training accounts need to be ready by Friday. The sales team reported a 7% decrease in conversion rates from paid channels, which will be addressed in a strategy meeting set for Wednesday.

tasks.description: Reschedule the two client onboarding calls
Fix the recurring bug in the invoice generation tool
Prepare access badges, laptops, and training accounts for new interns
Address the 7% decrease in conversion rates from paid channels in a strategy meeting
